findings.finding: The post-approval coordinator replays the deterministic exact-HEAD readiness operation through GameApi.Client, requires a completed durable receipt, and fetches current PR state before starting the merge-capable deployment-verifier.

A cached confirmed handoff cannot bypass BOS confirmation; restart reuses the same operationId, while rejection, stale identity, closed/non-open state, draft state, or head mismatch stops the sequence before merge.

Exact-commit evidence for c3554e69d100bbf2a0fe5ec4badfbd8459138dc4 reports 5 targeted coordinator tests and the full make all gate passing with 278 tests, 2 skipped, formatting, specs, Credo, 100% coverage, and Dialyzer.

summary: Passed: exact-commit implementation and validation affirmatively show idempotent BOS-only draft-PR promotion, authoritative current-state confirmation, response-loss recovery, and fail-closed protection before policy-checked merge.
